prompt: Create a cinematic, ultra-detailed anthropomorphic noir scene inside the back seat of a vintage Paris taxi at night. Two elegant characters sit side by side on a deep burgundy velvet bench seat: on the left, a glamorous red feathered bird-woman showgirl with layered crimson, wine, copper, gold, and violet plumage forming a couture feather dress, dark gloves, long visible legs, and a vivid cabaret plume headpiece; on the right, a gray wolf-headed gentleman wearing a tailored light gray pinstripe three-piece suit, black shirt, bright red tie, red pocket square, black gloves, and polished black shoes, seated with one leg crossed and one arm resting confidently. Both characters face forward in a poised, mysterious fashion, with their faces deliberately hidden by large opaque square blocks, giving the image an anonymized or redacted look. The taxi interior is dark, warm, and luxurious, with curved windows, black trim, a small glowing dome light overhead, and soft amber reflections. Through the rear window, show a rainy Paris boulevard at night with the Eiffel Tower centered in the distance, blurred streetlights, wet pavement, and glowing bokeh; through the side windows include visible storefront signage reading TAXI PARISIEN on the left and LE CONSULAT on the right. Use dramatic low-key lighting, glossy rain reflections, rich red and gold color grading, shallow depth of field outside the taxi, realistic fantasy character design, high-end digital painting detail, and a widescreen cinematic composition.
